rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly revised the section, addressing overgeneralizations and providing clear mechanisms for PPO's failure, thus demonstrating end-to-end logical consistency.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited each major claim against evidence, ensuring alignment by restricting claims to tested conditions and suggesting quantifications.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainties regarding unverified figures and data assumptions, clearly marking where uncertainties existed.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without any drift, exactly covering the agreed-upon revisions.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced, ensuring downstream safety.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations, meeting the mid-level anchor.
